questions.clue: The bench press & chest fly are popular exercises for working out these muscles, also called "pecs"

As its punny name implies, Vinyl Resting Place in Portland, Oregon is a small business that sells these collectibles

Not to be confused with fusion, this process creates energy by splitting an atom's nucleus into fragments

In humans, the 2 bones of the lower leg are the tibia & this, the third-longest bone in the body
This technology transmits information as tiny pulses of light through thin transparent wires

categories.name: WHAT'S IN THE BOARD GAME BOX?

Color-coded plastic armies,42 territory cards,5 dice
19 terrain hexes,60 roads,1 robber

questions.answer: when the cat's away, the mice will play

questions.clue: Sometimes folks get set in their ways & it's difficult to change their habits:Y.C.T.A.O.D.N.T.
questions.answer: you can't teach an old dog new tricks

questions.clue: People with similar interests tend to gravitate toward each other:B.O.A.F.F.T.
